utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, destination is present and fully specified (Prague, Czech Republic). travel_dates are specified (July 10th–14th, 2024). transportation is specified with provider, details, cost, and currency—fully covered. accommodation is present with name, details, cost, and currency—fully covered. activities are listed with names, costs, and currencies—fully covered. additional_services is null—this means it is not included. total_budget includes total_cost, initial_budget, remaining_budget, and currency—fully covered. Thus, 6 out of 7 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation (Standard Airline Economy Class), accommodation (Family Haven Hotel), and three activities (Prague Zoo, Street Art Tour, City Walking Tour). From the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has a rating of 7. For transportation, 'Standard Airline Economy Class' corresponds to 'standard_airlines' → 'Economy Class' with a rating of 7. For accommodation, 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9. For activities, 'Prague Zoo' aligns with 'Zoo' (rating 9), 'Street Art Tour' has a rating of 8, and 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9.
